metadata.name: Parametric Electrobox IP65
metadata.objective: A 3D-printable, water-resistant enclosure with a recessed lid and internal screw pillars.

design_requirements.parametric: All dimensions (L, W, H, wall thickness) are variable via top-level parameters.
design_requirements.internal_lip: The box features an internal 'shoulder' or lip on the upper rim.
design_requirements.sealing_method: Sealing occurs on the inside of the rim, rather than overlapping the exterior.
design_requirements.hugging_pillars: Internal walls and the sealing lip curve fluidly around the circular screw posts (slaloming).
design_requirements.ip65_integrity: Screw holes in the base are blind (do not penetrate the exterior) to ensure water resistance.
design_requirements.tolerances: Includes an adjustable gap between the lid edge and the box groove for 3D printing fit.

render_options.comment_show_box: Set to true to render the bottom enclosure.
render_options.comment_show_lid: Set to true to render the top lid.

dimensions.comment_H_box: Height of the bottom box part.
dimensions.comment_fn: Number of fragments for circles and arcs.

gland_1.comment: Toggle and diameter for left side gland (X-axis).

gland_2.comment: Toggle and diameter for right side gland (X-axis).

lip_and_seal.comment_fit_tolerance: Extra clearance between lid and box.

mounting_posts.comment_post_R: Radius of the solid screw posts in the corners.
mounting_posts.comment_head_R: Radius for the countersunk screw head.
mounting_posts.comment_fillet_R: Radius of the smooth fillet between posts and walls (hugging pillars).
